subject: refactor(auth): rename workspace_id to user_id, simplify auth model
body:
Backend uses auth.uid() directly for RLS — no workspace_id trigger
or app_metadata management needed. Frontend just calls
signInAnonymously() and passes the access_token as Bearer.

Tags: auth, refactor, types, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: supabase-auth
Semver: major
